name: Leg Raise with Hip Lift
aliases: lying leg raise with hip lift
shortDescription: A core exercise combining a leg raise with a hip lift to target the lower abdominals.
instructions: Lie on your back with your arms by your sides. Raise your legs until they are perpendicular to the floor, then lift your hips off the ground by contracting your lower abs. Lower back slowly with control.
steps: Lie flat with arms at your sides and legs straight.
Raise your legs up together towards the ceiling.
At the top of the movement, press your legs up by lifting your hips off the ground.
Lower your hips and legs back to the starting position slowly.
breathing: Exhale during hip lift, inhale during the descent.
